utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Here is the thing , Janice . You know , I mean , it is like we are different . I am like the bing , bing , bing . You are like the boom , boom , ... boom .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , my god , I am so sorry . Are you ok ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_I hit her in the eye ! I hit her in the eye !

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Ow . Um , it is just my lens . It is just my lens . I will be right back .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I hit her in the eye ! I hit her in the eye !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I hit her in the eye ! I hit her in the eye ! This is the worst break ... up in the history of the world .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: How many of those have you had ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , I do not know , a million ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Chandler , easy , easy . Go to your happy place . La la la la la la la .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am not fine . Here she comes .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We should always always break up together .
